---
title: "Developmental trajectories of racial attitudes in young children"
description: "Undergraduate Research Class Project"
date: 2025-12-14
resources: "."
image: cover.png
about: 
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: file-code
      text: "Report"
      href: projects/racial_attitudes/report.html
    - icon: file-easel 
      text: "Poster"
      href: projects/racial_attitudes/poster.pdf
---

**Collaborator**: Smrithi Krishnaswamy\
**Advisor**: Rebecca Farina

This work was awarded **First Place in the CMU Statistics Department Poster Competition** at *Meeting of the Minds for the 2025–2026 academic year*. This project analyzed developmental patterns in young children’s racial attitudes using pretest and posttest data from a classroom literacy intervention. Using the Preschool Racial Attitude Measure (PRAM) and a Friendship task, we applied exploratory analysis, repeated-measures ANOVA, and logistic and multinomial regression models to examine individual differences and predictors of change. Results showed task-specific baseline predictors and no overall short-term intervention effect, while classroom diversity was associated with posttest attitudes.
